elems.value:
"
    {
        %s
        %s
        BIND(?value AS ?x)

        %s

        BIND(BNODE() AS ?validationResult)
        BIND(%s AS ?sourceConstraintComponent) 
        BIND(%s AS ?resultMessage)
    }
    "

o.value: "value should be an IRI or a literal"
"value should be a blank node or a literal"
"value should be a blank node or an IRI"

elems.value: "value should be greater than or equal to %s"
"value should be less than or equal to %s"
"value should have length greater than or equal to %s"
"value should have length less than or equal to %s"
"value should have one of the language tags: %s"
"CONCAT(\"language '\", ?lang, \"' has been used by \", STR(?count), \" values\")"
"Must have no values in common with %s"

"
    {
        %s

        ?focusNode %s ?value . 
        ?focusNode %s ?value .
    
        BIND(BNODE() AS ?validationResult)
        BIND(sh:DisjointConstraintComponent AS ?sourceConstraintComponent)
        BIND(%s AS ?resultMessage)
    }
    "
"Must have no values in common with %s"

"
    {
        %s

        BIND(?focusNode AS ?value)
        ?focusNode %s ?value . 
    
        BIND(BNODE() AS ?validationResult)
        BIND(sh:DisjointConstraintComponent AS ?sourceConstraintComponent)
        BIND(%s AS ?resultMessage)
    }
    "
"CONCAT(\"value is not less than or equal to \", STR(?otherValue))"

s.value: "value should not conform to the shape"
"value must conform to all shapes in AND"

elems.value:
"
    {
        %s

        ?focusNode ?resultPath ?value .
        FILTER(?resultPath NOT IN (%s))
        
        BIND(BNODE() AS ?validationResult)
        BIND(sh:ClosedConstraintComponent AS ?sourceConstraintComponent)
        BIND(%s AS ?resultMessage)
    }
    "

"
    {
        %s

        FILTER(?focusNode != %s)

        BIND(BNODE() AS ?validationResult)
        BIND(sh:HasValueConstraintComponent AS ?sourceConstraintComponent)
        BIND(%s AS ?resultMessage)
    }
    "

s.value: "value should be one of the values in the list"
